frontmatter.title: A model of guarded recursion via generalised equilogical spaces
frontmatter.meta: @article{bizjak-birkedal:2018:tcs, author = {Bizjak, Ale\v{s} and Birkedal, Lars}, date = {2018}, doi = {10.1016/j.tcs.2018.02.012}, issn = {0304-3975}, journaltitle = {Theoretical Computer Science}, keywords = {Semantics,Dependent type theory,Guarded recursion,Equilogical spaces}, pages = {1--18}, title = {A model of guarded recursion via generalised equilogical spaces}, volume = {722}, }
